params.name: Top Idea Award
params.description:
On Oct 27, 2010 AD, the first Top Idea Award ceremony was held in Shenzhen, China.
The Top Idea Award is established to discover and recognize designers and organizations that demonstrate outstanding innovation in urban design, spatial design, artistic expression, and cultural characteristics. Its global platform for spatial design ideas and sustainable living concepts has gained widespread recognition from the international community.
